summary: I have completed the Round 1 critique of the UX review. While the author correctly identified superficial issues like window.prompt and high information density, they overlooked several critical architectural flaws including the lack of a suitable backend for the proposed file picker, redundant API calls for data fetching, and inconsistent modal usage (alert/confirm). I have recommended a revision to push for a more holistic and technically feasible redesign that addresses these underlying systemic issues.
